# Crusoe

**Category:** AI Colocation / GPU Hosting Partners  
**Website:** https://www.crusoe.ai/

## Headline
Energy-linked AI infrastructure builder connecting compute deployments to power-constrained and stranded-energy environments.

## Overview
Crusoe matters because it sits at the intersection of AI infrastructure, on-site power strategy, and nontraditional capacity development. It is useful in comparisons where buyers are not just choosing a host, but evaluating whether power-linked deployment models can unlock faster or cheaper AI capacity in constrained markets.

## Key capabilities
- AI hosting and compute capacity tied to energy-aware deployment models
- power-integrated site development for remote or nontraditional capacity regions
- infrastructure packaging that combines compute, generation, and operational delivery

## Best fit for
- AI buyers exploring alternatives to conventional colocation footprints
- teams comparing grid-constrained markets versus energy-linked site strategies
- operators evaluating how generation and compute can be developed together

## Considerations
Best compared not only against colocation operators, but also against modular power, microgrid, and site-strategy vendors to understand where the real moat sits: capacity, power access, or deployment model.
